channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Full Crew
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: World Wide
Description:

Experienced officers and ratings are sought for various maritime positions across LNG, LPG, Oil/Chemical tankers, and tug vessels. Opportunities include 2/3 Officers, 4/3 Engineers on LNG carriers, Chief Officer on tug boats, Master/Chief Officer/Chief Engineer/2nd Engineer on VLGCs, and various ranks on Oil/Chemical tankers. Joining dates, contract durations, salaries, and trading areas vary by position. Mandatory requirements include relevant experience in rank, valid STCW certificates, and EU citizenship/residence.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Officer, Rating Vacancies - LNG, LPG, Tanker, Tug at LAPA LTD

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced maritime professionals are sought for positions including Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, and 2nd Engineer on a fleet of state-of-the-art VLEC vessels. Previous experience on LPG vessels is required for these roles. The vessels are noted for their cutting-edge designs and dual-fuel, electronically controlled engines, emphasizing efficiency and sustainability.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] VLEC Crew Vacancies - Master, Chief Officer, Engineers at Uniteam Marine

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, and 2nd Engineer are sought for a modern VLEC fleet. Previous experience on LPG vessels is required. These state-of-the-art vessels utilize dual-fuel, electronically controlled engines, setting new standards in efficiency and sustainability.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] VLEC Officer and Engineer Jobs at Uniteam Marine

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple maritime and offshore positions are currently open. Vacancies include roles for Chief Engineers, ABs, Motormen, Mechanics, 3rd Engineers, 2nd Mates/DPOs, Masters, and potentially others. Opportunities are available across various vessel types such as Multicat, CTV, AHT, Survey, Jack Up (DP), Jack Up Barge, OSV, Construction Support Vessel, and Rock Dumper with DP. Positions are located in Europe, the Middle East, Far East, Denmark, and East Africa, with various start dates in July and August 2026 and contract durations ranging from two weeks to several trips.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Offshore Job Vacancies at ORCA Crew Services

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple maritime positions are available on Chemical Tankers, LPG Tankers, Bulk Carriers, and Container Carriers. Roles include Master, Chief Officer, Second Officer, Third Officer, Junior Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, Third Engineer, Fourth Engineer, Gas Engineer, and Electrician. Contract durations are typically 4±1 months or 6±1 months. A USA visa is required for some positions. Salaries range from 1,550 to 16,000 USD.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Officer and Engineer Vacancies on Various Vessels at TBC Shipmanagement (The Best Crew LTD)

item.description:
Location: Europe
Description:

A Medic position is available on a Jack Up Barge for a contract of 2 weeks, with multiple trips possible. The role is based in Europe and is scheduled to commence on September 1, 2026. Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and be available for the specified duration.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Medic Job on Jack Up Barge at ORCA Crew Services

item.description:
Location: Europe / Middle East / Denmark / Far East / Mediterranean / East Africa
Description:

Multiple maritime and offshore positions are available, including Chief Engineer, AB, Motorman, Mechanic, 3rd Engineer, Medic, 2nd Mate/DPO, and Master. Roles are on various vessel types such as Multicat, CTV, AHT, Survey, Jack Up, OSV, Construction Support Vessels, and Rock Dumpers. Opportunities are located in Europe, the Middle East, Denmark, Far East, Mediterranean, and East Africa, with joining dates starting from July 2026. Contract durations vary from 2 to 8 weeks.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Offshore Job Vacancies - Multiple Ranks Vessels at ORCA Crew Services

item.description:
Location: Liverpool, UK, Portugal
Description:

Multiple maritime positions are available, including Able Seaman, Cook, and Captain roles. Opportunities exist on tugs, multicats, and yachts, with joining dates in July and mid-August 2026. Contract durations vary, including 4 weeks on/4 weeks off rotations and initial 4-week periods with potential for extension. Locations include Liverpool, UK, and Portugal. Specific requirements vary by role, such as UK Right to Work, experience on tugs, anchor handling, crane operation, and relevant certifications like Yachtmaster Offshore or Master 200GT CoC.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman, Cook, Captain, Tug, Yacht Roles at GreenTec

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Qualified Chief Officers, Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, Electricians, and Crane Operators are sought for AHTS and OSV vessels operating on a Saudi Aramco project. Positions require 2+ years of relevant experience on similar offshore vessels, with specific COC/certification requirements. Contract durations are approximately 3-4 months. Joining is ASAP upon provisional approval. Salary is to be discussed. Candidates must have documents valid for over 12 months and not hold a valid KSA visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Vacancies: Chief Officer, Engineer, Electrician, Crane Operator at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Banten
Description:

A Vessel Operator position is available for a bulk carrier fleet. Candidates require a Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Marine/Nautical Studies, Maritime Operations, or a related field, or former Deck/Engine Officer experience. A minimum of 2 years in shipping or vessel operations is necessary. The role is based in Banten and requires strong operational skills and attention to detail.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Vessel Operator Job - Bulk Carrier at PT Indobaruna Bulk Transport
